name: Tiger Credit Card

international: Priority Pass membership is complimentary ($99 value), but visits beyond the 2 complimentary visits are charged at standard rates.

additionalBenefits: 1 complimentary golf game or lesson per quarter
1 complimentary movie ticket up to ₹500 every 6 months on BookMyShow
Auto Assist roadside emergency services (breakdown, key replacement, flat tire)
additionalDetails: Cash redemption is capped at 5,000 reward points per calendar month

airlinePartners.notes: Capped at 25,000 reward points per month; transfer via IndusMoments portal

salaried: Eligibility is subject to IndusInd Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to IndusInd Bank approval criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Reward Points redemption towards InterMiles discontinued effective 21st January, 2025.
Priority Pass membership is complimentary ($99 value), but visits beyond the 2 complimentary visits are charged at standard rates.
[2026-06-14] Air India Maharaja Club added as airline partner at 1:1 ratio (1 reward point = 1 Maharaja Club point), capped at 25,000 points per month, transferred via IndusMoments portal.
